methodology.description: Cross-correlation analysis at monthly time step

sm_to_recharge.interpretation: Soil moisture and recharge respond simultaneously in mHM. The weak correlation suggests other processes (ET, routing) mediate the relationship.

sm_to_runoff.interpretation: SM and runoff are tightly coupled. Fast surface/subsurface flow pathways dominate.

recharge_to_runoff.interpretation: Recharge contributes to baseflow but other sources also contribute.

parthe_analysis.finding: NOT CONFIRMED - was a data processing bug
parthe_analysis.actual: Parthe shows same 0-month lag as other catchments
parthe_analysis.explanation: Monthly aggregation may be too coarse to capture slow groundwater dynamics

model_implications.fast_coupling: SM ↔ Runoff responds within same month
model_implications.recommendation: Use daily data for groundwater lag analysis
